nameMeanings.name: Hodart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Walloon and northern French (mainly Pas-de-Calais): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bodo ‘messenger’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’.

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Francoise de Hodart was born about 1425. She married Theaude de Chateaubriant about 1445, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son.
